title: Set up Vercel AI SDK for streaming AI chat in Next.js
summary: Install the AI SDK, create a streaming chat API route, and build a real-time chat UI with useChat — works with OpenAI, Anthropic, and other providers.
declaration: I will set up the Vercel AI SDK (ai package) with a streaming chat API route and useChat hook. This uses the AI SDK's unified interface, which works with OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, and other providers. Specify your provider before I begin — default is OpenAI gpt-4o-mini.
